cards.title: Detoxification — Principles & Phases

alerts.label: Hepatic Detoxification
alerts.text: The liver detoxifies in 3 phases. Supporting all 3 phases is essential — activating Phase 1 without Phase 2 support can increase toxicity (Phase 1 produces reactive intermediates).

rows: CYP450 converts fat-soluble toxins to reactive intermediates
B2, B3, B6, B12, folate, glutathione, flavonoids
Glycine, taurine, glutamine, cysteine, methionine, sulfur
Eggs (sulfur), cruciferous, garlic, onion, whey protein

pearls.label: 🟡 Pearl — Phase 2 Induction
pearls.text: Sulforaphane (from broccoli sprouts) is the most potent Phase 2 inducer known. 3-day-old broccoli sprouts contain 50–100x more sulforaphane than mature broccoli. Protocol: 1 cup broccoli sprouts daily or sulforaphane supplement 50mg/day during detox. This activates Nrf2 pathway — the master regulator of cellular detoxification and antioxidant defence.

cards._legacyHtml:
Hepatic Detoxification
The liver detoxifies in 3 phases. Supporting all 3 phases is essential — activating Phase 1 without Phase 2 support can increase toxicity (Phase 1 produces reactive intermediates).
PhaseProcessEnzymesNutrients RequiredSupported By
Phase 1 (Oxidation)CYP450 converts fat-soluble toxins to reactive intermediatesCYP1A2, CYP3A4, etc.B2, B3, B6, B12, folate, glutathione, flavonoidsCruciferous veg, green tea, resveratrol
Phase 2 (Conjugation)Intermediates conjugated to water-soluble moleculesGlutathione-S-transferase, sulfotransferase, UGTGlycine, taurine, glutamine, cysteine, methionine, sulfurEggs (sulfur), cruciferous, garlic, onion, whey protein
Phase 3 (Elimination)Conjugated toxins excreted via bile/urine/sweatTransporters (MRP2, P-gp)Adequate hydration, fibre, bile saltsWater 3L/day, fibre 30g/day, bile support herbs
🟡 Pearl — Phase 2 Induction
Sulforaphane (from broccoli sprouts) is the most potent Phase 2 inducer known. 3-day-old broccoli sprouts contain 50–100x more sulforaphane than mature broccoli. Protocol: 1 cup broccoli sprouts daily or sulforaphane supplement 50mg/day during detox. This activates Nrf2 pathway — the master regulator of cellular detoxification and antioxidant defence.

cards.title: 7-Day Detox Programme — Clinical Protocol

steps.title: Days 1–2: Preparation
steps.text: Reduce caffeine, alcohol, processed food, red meat gradually (avoid withdrawal headache). Increase water to 3L/day. Begin dry brushing (lymphatic stimulation). Start castor oil packs over liver each evening (30 min). Baseline weight, BP, and symptoms documented.

steps.title: Days 3–5: Active Detox
steps.text: Mono diet: kitchari (mung dal + rice) or vegetable broth and steamed vegetables only. Lemon water (warm) on waking. Morning: dry brushing + 20 min yoga. Afternoon: hydrotherapy (contrast shower or steam bath). Evening: castor oil pack + meditation. Coffee enema optional day 3 and 5.

steps.title: Days 6–7: Rebuilding
steps.text: Gradually reintroduce: steamed vegetables → fruits → whole grains → legumes → fish. Continue 3L water. Add probiotics (Lactobacillus acidophilus 10 billion CFU). Maintain no caffeine, alcohol, processed food. Document symptom resolution, energy, bowel habits.

Afternoon: hydrotherapy (contrast shower or steam bath). Evening: castor oil pack + meditation. Coffee enema optional day 3 and 5.

SupplementDoseTimingPurpose
Milk thistle (silymarin)200mg TDSWith mealsHepatoprotective, Phase 1+2 support
N-Acetyl Cysteine (NAC)600mg BDWith foodGlutathione precursor — Phase 2
Alpha lipoic acid300mg ODMorningUniversal antioxidant, regenerates glutathione
Chlorella3g ODMorningHeavy metal binding, chlorophyll

cards.title: Heavy Metal Detox — Naturopathic Approach

alerts.label: Important
alerts.text: Chelation therapy (EDTA, DMSA, DMPS) is a medical procedure requiring physician supervision. Naturopathic heavy metal protocols support natural elimination pathways and are NOT a substitute for medical chelation in acute poisoning.

rows: Old paint, pipes, soil, imported spices

pearls.label: 🟡 Cilantro + Chlorella Protocol
pearls.text: Widely used naturopathic approach: Chlorella 3–5g/day (binds metals in gut, prevents reabsorption) + fresh cilantro (coriander leaves) 1–2 tbsp daily in food (mobilises metals from tissues). Always use chlorella BEFORE cilantro — cilantro mobilises metals, chlorella must be present to capture them. Without chlorella, cilantro alone may redistribute metals to other tissues. Duration: 3–6 months with monthly symptom review.

cards._legacyHtml:
Important
Chelation therapy (EDTA, DMSA, DMPS) is a medical procedure requiring physician supervision. Naturopathic heavy metal protocols support natural elimination pathways and are NOT a substitute for medical chelation in acute poisoning.
MetalSourcesSymptomsNatural Binders
LeadOld paint, pipes, soil, imported spicesCognitive impairment, anaemia, neuropathyChlorella, pectin, garlic, NAC
MercuryLarge fish (tuna, swordfish), amalgam fillingsTremor, cognitive decline, peripheral neuropathyChlorella, cilantro, selenium, NAC
ArsenicRice, well water, pesticidesSkin lesions, neuropathy, GI symptomsFolate, B12, selenium, garlic
CadmiumSmoking, contaminated food, batteriesRenal damage, bone loss, fatigueZinc (competitive), NAC, selenium
AluminiumCookware, antiperspirants, antacids, vaccinesCognitive issues, bone painSilicon-rich water, curcumin, quercetin
🟡 Cilantro + Chlorella Protocol
Widely used naturopathic approach: Chlorella 3–5g/day (binds metals in gut, prevents reabsorption) + fresh cilantro (coriander leaves) 1–2 tbsp daily in food (mobilises metals from tissues). Always use chlorella BEFORE cilantro — cilantro mobilises metals, chlorella must be present to capture them. Without chlorella, cilantro alone may redistribute metals to other tissues. Duration: 3–6 months with monthly symptom review.

cards.title: Lymphatic Drainage & Skin Detox Techniques

alerts.label: Lymphatic System
alerts.text: The lymphatic system carries 3–4L of interstitial fluid daily, removing cellular waste. Unlike the cardiovascular system, lymph has no pump — it relies entirely on muscle movement, breathing, and massage.

pearls.label: 🟡 Lymphoedema Caution
pearls.text: All lymphatic drainage techniques are contraindicated in: active infection/cellulitis (spreads infection), DVT (may dislodge clot), active cancer (may spread malignant cells — require oncologist approval), cardiac failure (cannot handle increased fluid return). Manual Lymphatic Drainage (MLD) by a trained therapist is the evidence-based treatment for lymphoedema — use feather-light pressure only (40–60g/cm²). Combined Decongestive Therapy (CDT) = MLD + compression garments + exercise + skin care.

steps.title: Dry Skin Brushing
steps.text: Natural bristle brush on dry skin before shower. Brush towards heart: feet → legs → hands → arms → torso. Duration 5–7 min daily. Benefits: lymphatic flow stimulation, dead skin removal, improved circulation. Do before contrast shower for synergistic effect.

steps.title: Contrast Hydrotherapy
steps.text: Alternate hot 3 min and cold 30–60 sec, end on cold, 3–5 cycles. Vasodilation (hot) and vasoconstriction (cold) creates a pumping action for lymph and blood. Benefits: lymphatic circulation up, immune activation, cortisol down. Use daily during detox programme.

steps.title: Rebounding
steps.text: 10–15 min on mini-trampoline daily — one of the most effective lymphatic stimulants. Each bounce creates G-force fluctuation — lymphatic valves open during upward phase. Lymph flow increases 15x during rebounding vs rest. Even gentle bouncing (feet not leaving surface) is effective and safe.

steps.title: Castor Oil Pack (Liver)
steps.text: Apply cold-pressed castor oil over right upper abdomen, cover with flannel cloth and heat pack (40–45°C) for 45–60 min. Use 4–5x/week. Mechanism: ricinoleic acid stimulates lymphatic circulation, liver blood flow, and bile production. Excellent for liver detox, constipation, pelvic congestion.

Combined Decongestive Therapy (CDT) = MLD + compression garments + exercise + skin care.
